channel.title: Awesome Mac - Recent App Additions
channel.description: Recently added macOS apps tracked from awesome-mac.

item.title: LingShu
item.description: Category: AI Tools App: LingShu Description: Open-source, model-agnostic macOS agent for verified code, documents, slides, and computer actions. Website: https://royzhao1991.github.io/LingShu/ Commit: Add LingShu to AI Tools (#2355) Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/cac4ce1bd06dd55a1504c2bd67548b4f19560284
item.content:encoded:
Category: AI Tools
App: LingShu
Description: Open-source, model-agnostic macOS agent for verified code, documents, slides, and computer actions.
Website: https://royzhao1991.github.io/LingShu/
Commit: Add LingShu to AI Tools (#2355)
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/cac4ce1bd06dd55a1504c2bd67548b4f19560284

item.title: Changes
item.description: Category: Developer Tools / Version Control App: Changes Description: GUI Git client. Replace the Git CLI with a clear UI and AI assist. Open Source: https://github.com/maoyama/Changes Commit: Rename Tempo => Changes (#2353) Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/1cb8d656a855ddcba6dd6067cb872d1f664c0bed
item.content:encoded:
Category: Developer Tools / Version Control
App: Changes
Description: GUI Git client. Replace the Git CLI with a clear UI and AI assist.
Open Source: https://github.com/maoyama/Changes
Commit: Rename Tempo => Changes (#2353)
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/1cb8d656a855ddcba6dd6067cb872d1f664c0bed

item.title: StrokeMouse
item.description: Category: Utilities / Productivity App: StrokeMouse Description: Custom mouse gestures that can trigger keyboard shortcuts, open apps, perform window actions, run shell commands, or execute AppleScript after drawing a stroke. Website: https://strokemouse.com Commit: Add StrokeMouse (#2348) Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/374d97eadae73a9fb5936f0ef116cfda5cfa051a
item.content:encoded:
Category: Utilities / Productivity
App: StrokeMouse
Description: Custom mouse gestures that can trigger keyboard shortcuts, open apps, perform window actions, run shell commands, or execute AppleScript after drawing a stroke.
Website: https://strokemouse.com
Commit: Add StrokeMouse (#2348)
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/374d97eadae73a9fb5936f0ef116cfda5cfa051a

item.title: LokalBot
item.description: Category: AI Tools App: LokalBot Description: On-device meeting notes, dictation, inline autocomplete, and searchable work memory for macOS. Website: https://www.lokalbot.com/ Commit: Add LokalBot to AI Tools (#2340) Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/bbb627863dad9c5e4bd947cea7e7aa7d0ad73077
item.content:encoded:
Category: AI Tools
App: LokalBot
Description: On-device meeting notes, dictation, inline autocomplete, and searchable work memory for macOS.
Website: https://www.lokalbot.com/
Commit: Add LokalBot to AI Tools (#2340)
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/bbb627863dad9c5e4bd947cea7e7aa7d0ad73077

item.title: Tura
item.description: Category: AI Tools App: Tura Description: Tura is a local, open-source coding agent for developers who are tired of vague skill claims, token-saving extensions with no evidence, and agents that change a repository before understanding it. Website: https://turaai.net/ Commit: Add Tura to AI tools (#2333) Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/179e5205a44847b71ec551a434481e3bd76eee50
item.content:encoded:
Category: AI Tools
App: Tura
Description: Tura is a local, open-source coding agent for developers who are tired of vague skill claims, token-saving extensions with no evidence, and agents that change a repository before understanding it.
Website: https://turaai.net/
Commit: Add Tura to AI tools (#2333)
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/179e5205a44847b71ec551a434481e3bd76eee50

item.title: TabType
item.description: Category: Reading and Writing Tools / Others App: TabType Description: Free, open-source AI autocomplete for every Mac app — on-device ghost-text suggestions powered by a local LLM (MLX); nothing leaves your Mac. Open Source: https://github.com/nilava/TabType Commit: Add TabType to list of Mac applications (#2339) Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/8b5b02e1fc9960348e88e2e327dada942434540e
item.content:encoded:
Category: Reading and Writing Tools / Others
App: TabType
Description: Free, open-source AI autocomplete for every Mac app — on-device ghost-text suggestions powered by a local LLM (MLX); nothing leaves your Mac.
Open Source: https://github.com/nilava/TabType
Commit: Add TabType to list of Mac applications (#2339)
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/8b5b02e1fc9960348e88e2e327dada942434540e

item.title: Segue
item.category: Audio and Video Tools / Audio Record and Process
item.description: Category: Audio and Video Tools / Audio Record and Process App: Segue Description: Broadcast audio playout with crossfade, trim, ramp timers, and pause beds for live radio and podcasts. Website: https://segue.npearce.me/ Commit: Add Segue to Audio Record and Process (#2305) Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/fd4414f8a839fa2245bc1a9e18b0667c6ba21358
item.content:encoded:
Category: Audio and Video Tools / Audio Record and Process
App: Segue
Description: Broadcast audio playout with crossfade, trim, ramp timers, and pause beds for live radio and podcasts.
Website: https://segue.npearce.me/
Commit: Add Segue to Audio Record and Process (#2305)
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/fd4414f8a839fa2245bc1a9e18b0667c6ba21358

item.title: Nimclip
item.description: Category: Utilities / Clipboard Tools App: Nimclip Description: Local-first clipboard history manager with search, tags, and image support. Website: https://hukdoesn.github.io/Nimclip/ Commit: Add Nimclip to Clipboard Tools (#2328) Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/a9d5cabf74d696936d908f0b638492382621e012
item.content:encoded:
Category: Utilities / Clipboard Tools
App: Nimclip
Description: Local-first clipboard history manager with search, tags, and image support.
Website: https://hukdoesn.github.io/Nimclip/
Commit: Add Nimclip to Clipboard Tools (#2328)
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/a9d5cabf74d696936d908f0b638492382621e012

item.title: Agent Teams AI
item.description: Category: AI Tools App: Agent Teams AI Description: Open-source desktop app for coordinating autonomous AI coding agents through team messaging, task boards, and code review. Website: https://agentteams.live/ Commit: Add Agent Teams AI (#2322) Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/46652674d802cb0bd24ab7eb77f4514754286c0c
item.content:encoded:
Category: AI Tools
App: Agent Teams AI
Description: Open-source desktop app for coordinating autonomous AI coding agents through team messaging, task boards, and code review.
Website: https://agentteams.live/
Commit: Add Agent Teams AI (#2322)
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/46652674d802cb0bd24ab7eb77f4514754286c0c

item.title: MacTools
item.description: Category: Utilities / Menu Bar Tools App: MacTools Description: Open-source menu bar toolkit with plugins for display controls, system toggles, cleanup, device status, and everyday utilities. Open Source: https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools Commit: Add MacTools to menu bar tools (#2313) Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/6b86b33a56d2c8d32db6bc12c1478cdf2ed4f362
item.content:encoded:
Category: Utilities / Menu Bar Tools
App: MacTools
Description: Open-source menu bar toolkit with plugins for display controls, system toggles, cleanup, device status, and everyday utilities.
Open Source: https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools
Commit: Add MacTools to menu bar tools (#2313)
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/6b86b33a56d2c8d32db6bc12c1478cdf2ed4f362

item.title: OpenDisplay
item.description: Category: Utilities / General Tools App: OpenDisplay Description: Use a spare iPhone or iPad as a second display for your Mac, wired (USB) or over WiFi, with touch input. Website: https://opendisplay.app Commit: Add OpenDisplay to General Tools (#2308) Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/3e3e8aa2a7d7c6683d8f16933d3e82165cf8990d
item.content:encoded:
Category: Utilities / General Tools
App: OpenDisplay
Description: Use a spare iPhone or iPad as a second display for your Mac, wired (USB) or over WiFi, with touch input.
Website: https://opendisplay.app
Commit: Add OpenDisplay to General Tools (#2308)
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/3e3e8aa2a7d7c6683d8f16933d3e82165cf8990d

item.title: Tactile
item.description: Category: Utilities / Menu Bar Tools App: Tactile Description: Taps the Force Touch trackpad whenever the cursor is over a clickable element in any app, with optional visual cues as a low-vision aid. Open Source: https://github.com/Mason363/Tactile Commit: Add Tactile to Menu Bar Tools (#2298) Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/3b5fb45ce127372a39b453916df1e2054dc98267
item.content:encoded:
Category: Utilities / Menu Bar Tools
App: Tactile
Description: Taps the Force Touch trackpad whenever the cursor is over a clickable element in any app, with optional visual cues as a low-vision aid.
Open Source: https://github.com/Mason363/Tactile
Commit: Add Tactile to Menu Bar Tools (#2298)
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/3b5fb45ce127372a39b453916df1e2054dc98267

item.title: Presspeech
item.description: Category: Voice-to-Text App: Presspeech Description: Native push-to-talk local dictation app for Apple Silicon Macs using Parakeet TDT v3 (CoreML/ANE). Open Source: https://github.com/rcourtman/presspeech Commit: Update Presspeech listing (#2290) Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/1a8e1aa613e808a6ac97d1aa478d57a698af7d2a
item.content:encoded:
Category: Voice-to-Text
App: Presspeech
Description: Native push-to-talk local dictation app for Apple Silicon Macs using Parakeet TDT v3 (CoreML/ANE).
Open Source: https://github.com/rcourtman/presspeech
Commit: Update Presspeech listing (#2290)
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/1a8e1aa613e808a6ac97d1aa478d57a698af7d2a

item.title: Knopo
item.description: Category: Reading and Writing Tools / Note-taking App: Knopo Description: Native macOS outliner for local-first notes stored as plain Markdown files. Open Source: https://github.com/alkalim/Knopo Commit: Add Knopo (#2291) Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/1f253f397c243f38605012529fbc81b837fb1ada
item.content:encoded:
Category: Reading and Writing Tools / Note-taking
App: Knopo
Description: Native macOS outliner for local-first notes stored as plain Markdown files.
Open Source: https://github.com/alkalim/Knopo
Commit: Add Knopo (#2291)
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/1f253f397c243f38605012529fbc81b837fb1ada

item.title: Gemini Collector
item.description: Category: AI Tools App: Gemini Collector Description: Back up Google Gemini conversations, attachments, and AI-generated media locally as JSON. Open Source: https://github.com/FirenzeLor/gemini-collector Commit: Add Gemini Collector to AI Tools (#2295) Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/5ac5d87f284028cf73b34cb7b9a722ea5d0629e1
item.content:encoded:
Category: AI Tools
App: Gemini Collector
Description: Back up Google Gemini conversations, attachments, and AI-generated media locally as JSON.
Open Source: https://github.com/FirenzeLor/gemini-collector
Commit: Add Gemini Collector to AI Tools (#2295)
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/5ac5d87f284028cf73b34cb7b9a722ea5d0629e1

item.title: Profisor
item.description: Category: Utilities / Menu Bar Tools App: Profisor Description: Switch Xcode provisioning profiles for the current project from the menu bar. Open Source: https://github.com/yefga/Profisor Commit: Add Profisor (#2289) Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/68b54c06902da7c3eef7c2abcf1d28625dcb5de7
item.content:encoded:
Category: Utilities / Menu Bar Tools
App: Profisor
Description: Switch Xcode provisioning profiles for the current project from the menu bar.
Open Source: https://github.com/yefga/Profisor
Commit: Add Profisor (#2289)
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/68b54c06902da7c3eef7c2abcf1d28625dcb5de7

item.title: Battery Hog
item.description: Category: Utilities / System Related Tools App: Battery Hog Description: Shows what is draining the battery: live watts, per-app energy, charge history, and drain insights. 100% local. Open Source: https://github.com/luke-fairbanks/BatteryHog Commit: Add Battery Hog (#2285) Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/e34fa129f9bce64dbc862880429b71ea15c1afa3
item.content:encoded:
Category: Utilities / System Related Tools
App: Battery Hog
Description: Shows what is draining the battery: live watts, per-app energy, charge history, and drain insights. 100% local.
Open Source: https://github.com/luke-fairbanks/BatteryHog
Commit: Add Battery Hog (#2285)
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/e34fa129f9bce64dbc862880429b71ea15c1afa3

item.title: OATS
item.description: Category: Reading and Writing Tools / Note-taking App: OATS Description: Open-source local-first meeting-notes app for macOS with live transcription, speaker labels, AI summaries, and a fully offline on-device mode. Open Source: https://github.com/ariso-ai/oats Commit: Add Oats to Note-taking (#2268) Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/9654998824e9692ac4d6953152ff997cd884ac6c
item.content:encoded:
Category: Reading and Writing Tools / Note-taking
App: OATS
Description: Open-source local-first meeting-notes app for macOS with live transcription, speaker labels, AI summaries, and a fully offline on-device mode.
Open Source: https://github.com/ariso-ai/oats
Commit: Add Oats to Note-taking (#2268)
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/9654998824e9692ac4d6953152ff997cd884ac6c

item.title: Prevail
item.description: Category: AI Tools App: Prevail Description: Local-first AI life OS: any model per life-domain over a plain-markdown vault on your Mac. Signed and notarized. Website: https://prevail.sh Commit: Add Prevail to AI Tools (#2267) Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/d3dc33f0560c77b9ab7df83d2bd620121548f8e2
item.content:encoded:
Category: AI Tools
App: Prevail
Description: Local-first AI life OS: any model per life-domain over a plain-markdown vault on your Mac. Signed and notarized.
Website: https://prevail.sh
Commit: Add Prevail to AI Tools (#2267)
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/d3dc33f0560c77b9ab7df83d2bd620121548f8e2

item.title: tty7
item.description: Category: Terminal Apps App: tty7 Description: A GPU-rendered, daemon-backed terminal in pure Rust with sessions that stay alive without tmux. Open Source: https://github.com/l0ng-ai/tty7 Commit: Add tty7 to Terminal Apps (#2263) Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/258daea61a27fda55d57bea4be5d05b10c6c30a6
item.content:encoded:
Category: Terminal Apps
App: tty7
Description: A GPU-rendered, daemon-backed terminal in pure Rust with sessions that stay alive without tmux.
Open Source: https://github.com/l0ng-ai/tty7
Commit: Add tty7 to Terminal Apps (#2263)
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/258daea61a27fda55d57bea4be5d05b10c6c30a6

item.title: TokenTracker
item.description: Category: AI Tools App: TokenTracker Description: Local-first menu bar app and CLI that tracks token usage and cost across 20+ AI coding tools. Website: https://www.tokentracker.cc Commit: Add TokenTracker to AI Tools (#2101) Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/baa66734f625ca23b69f94f1b10bc972395eaca2
item.content:encoded:
Category: AI Tools
App: TokenTracker
Description: Local-first menu bar app and CLI that tracks token usage and cost across 20+ AI coding tools.
Website: https://www.tokentracker.cc
Commit: Add TokenTracker to AI Tools (#2101)
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/baa66734f625ca23b69f94f1b10bc972395eaca2

item.title: Wox
item.description: Category: Utilities / Productivity App: Wox Description: Open-source cross-platform launcher with fast local search and plugin extensibility. Website: https://wox-launcher.github.io/Wox/ Commit: Add Wox #2047 Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/c4c9f9831cd203db51e91224fc49a4b595fe3b05
item.content:encoded:
Category: Utilities / Productivity
App: Wox
Description: Open-source cross-platform launcher with fast local search and plugin extensibility.
Website: https://wox-launcher.github.io/Wox/
Commit: Add Wox #2047
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/c4c9f9831cd203db51e91224fc49a4b595fe3b05

item.title: cctop
item.description: Category: Utilities / Menu Bar Tools App: cctop Description: Open-source menu bar monitor that shows live status for AI coding sessions (Claude Code, Codex, opencode, pi) and jumps to the right terminal pane or editor window. Website: https://cctop.app Commit: Add cctop to Menu Bar Tools (#2257) Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/bf1c1ff08d97d092e8fffbf171a1b54db9a3f6f9
item.content:encoded:
Category: Utilities / Menu Bar Tools
App: cctop
Description: Open-source menu bar monitor that shows live status for AI coding sessions (Claude Code, Codex, opencode, pi) and jumps to the right terminal pane or editor window.
Website: https://cctop.app
Commit: Add cctop to Menu Bar Tools (#2257)
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/bf1c1ff08d97d092e8fffbf171a1b54db9a3f6f9

item.title: MenubarCC
item.description: Category: Utilities / Menu Bar Tools App: MenubarCC Description: Menu bar crab that shows your Claude Code sessions at a glance: walking while Claude works, bouncing when it needs you. Open Source: https://github.com/ksterx/MenubarCC Commit: Add MenubarCC to Menu Bar Tools (#2249) Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/b197ea52da5a96b4566fe2c9f89384a3e5d39dff
item.content:encoded:
Category: Utilities / Menu Bar Tools
App: MenubarCC
Description: Menu bar crab that shows your Claude Code sessions at a glance: walking while Claude works, bouncing when it needs you.
Open Source: https://github.com/ksterx/MenubarCC
Commit: Add MenubarCC to Menu Bar Tools (#2249)
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/b197ea52da5a96b4566fe2c9f89384a3e5d39dff

item.title: Harbofly
item.description: Category: Utilities / Cleanup and Uninstall App: Harbofly Description: Menu bar app that auto-discovers and frees the disk space dev build artifacts and caches hog (DerivedData, node_modules, SPM/Homebrew caches). Zero telemetry, notarized. Website: https://harbofly.app/ Commit: Add Harbofly (#2252) Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/25bb81d6539f923d2e61d93842baddad421aa350
item.content:encoded:
Category: Utilities / Cleanup and Uninstall
App: Harbofly
Description: Menu bar app that auto-discovers and frees the disk space dev build artifacts and caches hog (DerivedData, node_modules, SPM/Homebrew caches). Zero telemetry, notarized.
Website: https://harbofly.app/
Commit: Add Harbofly (#2252)
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/25bb81d6539f923d2e61d93842baddad421aa350

item.title: MoonProxy
item.description: Category: Remote Login Software App: MoonProxy Description: GUI desktop client for FRP that puts local services on the internet with one click. Open Source: https://github.com/MoonProxyHQ/moonproxy-desktop Commit: Add MoonProxy — GUI FRP desktop client for intranet penetration (#2253) Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/74fa526ab4863efbf1ca55e285275451a56e76fa
item.content:encoded:
Category: Remote Login Software
App: MoonProxy
Description: GUI desktop client for FRP that puts local services on the internet with one click.
Open Source: https://github.com/MoonProxyHQ/moonproxy-desktop
Commit: Add MoonProxy — GUI FRP desktop client for intranet penetration (#2253)
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/74fa526ab4863efbf1ca55e285275451a56e76fa

item.title: StockDock
item.description: Category: Finance App: StockDock Description: Menu bar app for real-time stocks, ETFs, crypto and portfolio P&L. Privacy-first, no account, multi-currency. Open Source: https://github.com/simonsruggi/StockDock Commit: Add StockDock to Finance (#2255) Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/0229ada97eb9c9461912c322b5b562a65e3c656f
item.content:encoded:
Category: Finance
App: StockDock
Description: Menu bar app for real-time stocks, ETFs, crypto and portfolio P&L. Privacy-first, no account, multi-currency.
Open Source: https://github.com/simonsruggi/StockDock
Commit: Add StockDock to Finance (#2255)
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/0229ada97eb9c9461912c322b5b562a65e3c656f

item.title: Off Grid AI Desktop
item.description: Category: AI Tools App: Off Grid AI Desktop Description: Private, local-first AI for your Mac: local LLM chat, image generation, voice dictation, and memory search, all on-device. Website: https://getoffgridai.co/desktop Commit: Add Off Grid AI (private on-device AI for Mac) to AI Tools (#2256) Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/f35478aabb6b91edb5d81465bdf2a6168cba6be8
item.content:encoded:
Category: AI Tools
App: Off Grid AI Desktop
Description: Private, local-first AI for your Mac: local LLM chat, image generation, voice dictation, and memory search, all on-device.
Website: https://getoffgridai.co/desktop
Commit: Add Off Grid AI (private on-device AI for Mac) to AI Tools (#2256)
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/f35478aabb6b91edb5d81465bdf2a6168cba6be8

item.title: Vesta
item.description: Category: Terminal Apps App: Vesta Description: Native macOS terminal built on libghostty for running coding agents in parallel. Open Source: https://github.com/vestaterm/Vesta Commit: Add Vesta (#2243) Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/71b7e4bb8269a618f15398aee362dfd9d5d493bf
item.content:encoded:
Category: Terminal Apps
App: Vesta
Description: Native macOS terminal built on libghostty for running coding agents in parallel.
Open Source: https://github.com/vestaterm/Vesta
Commit: Add Vesta (#2243)
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/71b7e4bb8269a618f15398aee362dfd9d5d493bf

item.title: Edmund
item.category: Reading and Writing Tools / Markdown Tools [![Awesome List][awesome-list Icon]](https://github.com/BubuAnabelas/awesome-markdown#tools)
item.description: Category: Reading and Writing Tools / Markdown Tools [![Awesome List][awesome-list Icon]](https://github.com/BubuAnabelas/awesome-markdown#tools) App: Edmund Description: Minimal, native macOS Markdown editor with live preview; works with your existing files, no vault. Open Source: https://github.com/I7T5/Edmund Commit: Add Edmund (native macOS Markdown editor) to Markdown Tools (#2238) Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/be3e1f3e0f4def7643a7154b70f1037a1e873a27
item.content:encoded:
Category: Reading and Writing Tools / Markdown Tools [![Awesome List][awesome-list Icon]](https://github.com/BubuAnabelas/awesome-markdown#tools)
App: Edmund
Description: Minimal, native macOS Markdown editor with live preview; works with your existing files, no vault.
Open Source: https://github.com/I7T5/Edmund
Commit: Add Edmund (native macOS Markdown editor) to Markdown Tools (#2238)
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/be3e1f3e0f4def7643a7154b70f1037a1e873a27

item.title: Orca
item.description: Category: Developer Tools / IDEs App: Orca Description: An open-source IDE for running parallel AI coding agents (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Gemini, OpenCode), each in its own isolated git worktree. Website: https://onorca.dev Commit: Add Orca (#2235) Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/1f609c89b956fd69d55b722a81f14fa183c05130
item.content:encoded:
Category: Developer Tools / IDEs
App: Orca
Description: An open-source IDE for running parallel AI coding agents (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Gemini, OpenCode), each in its own isolated git worktree.
Website: https://onorca.dev
Commit: Add Orca (#2235)
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/1f609c89b956fd69d55b722a81f14fa183c05130

item.title: VoxFlow
item.description: Category: Voice-to-Text App: VoxFlow Description: Open-source voice input workspace with local and cloud ASR, OCR, history, and coding-agent workflows. Open Source: https://github.com/xingbofeng/VoxFlow Commit: Add VoxFlow (#2232) Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/064235d50be31cc75a8e91bf34e93a4e162fbfa0
item.content:encoded:
Category: Voice-to-Text
App: VoxFlow
Description: Open-source voice input workspace with local and cloud ASR, OCR, history, and coding-agent workflows.
Open Source: https://github.com/xingbofeng/VoxFlow
Commit: Add VoxFlow (#2232)
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/064235d50be31cc75a8e91bf34e93a4e162fbfa0

item.title: Pesty
item.description: Category: Utilities / Clipboard Tools App: Pesty Description: Free and open-source clipboard manager inspired by Paste, with a slide-up color-coded strip, pinboards, and search. Open Source: https://github.com/momenbasel/pesty Commit: Add Pesty to Clipboard Tools (#2229) Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/9428ae79120a7460996fdfbcc8913a3839a8d1ad
item.content:encoded:
Category: Utilities / Clipboard Tools
App: Pesty
Description: Free and open-source clipboard manager inspired by Paste, with a slide-up color-coded strip, pinboards, and search.
Open Source: https://github.com/momenbasel/pesty
Commit: Add Pesty to Clipboard Tools (#2229)
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/9428ae79120a7460996fdfbcc8913a3839a8d1ad

item.title: Claude Usage
item.description: Category: AI Tools App: Claude Usage Description: Menu bar app for Claude Code that keeps per-pane context (in the status line) and session/weekly usage always visible — no usage or context command to run. Open Source: https://github.com/Bread-bang/claude-usage Commit: Add Claude Usage to AI Tools (#2184) Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/0136ad87cd5608de92aca3500367e99bb9df939a
item.content:encoded:
Category: AI Tools
App: Claude Usage
Description: Menu bar app for Claude Code that keeps per-pane context (in the status line) and session/weekly usage always visible — no usage or context command to run.
Open Source: https://github.com/Bread-bang/claude-usage
Commit: Add Claude Usage to AI Tools (#2184)
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/0136ad87cd5608de92aca3500367e99bb9df939a

item.title: Vorssaint
item.description: Category: Utilities / Menu Bar Tools App: Vorssaint Description: Open-source menu bar toolkit for per-app volume, system monitoring, window control, clipboard history, keeping awake, and app cleanup. Website: https://vorssaint.com Commit: Add Vorssaint to Menu Bar Tools (#2223) Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/90b5d18990518c5378bcda16b8ce710f5f6ac632

Category: Utilities / Menu Bar Tools
App: Vorssaint

Website: https://vorssaint.com

item.title: mysa
item.description: Category: Utilities / Menu Bar Tools App: mysa Description: A macOS menu bar app for quick breathing breaks, with a frosted screen overlay and handwritten quotes. Open Source: https://github.com/alishansnsn/mysa Commit: Add mysa (#2215) Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/14e273dbfd26ededdb4c76acf46e3c738ac0f464
item.content:encoded:

App: mysa

Open Source: https://github.com/alishansnsn/mysa

item.title: SiliconScope
item.description: Category: Utilities / System Related Tools App: SiliconScope Description: Sudoless Apple Silicon system monitor (menu bar + dashboard) with first-class ANE, Media Engine and memory-bandwidth tracking plus an E/P-core breakdown — the chip-level signals Activity Monitor doesn't show. Website: https://siliconscope.calidalab.ai Commit: Add SiliconScope (Apple Silicon system monitor) (#2211) Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/fb07331b5de1a1e46041a802de0c779f62f24152
item.content:encoded:
Category: Utilities / System Related Tools
App: SiliconScope
Description: Sudoless Apple Silicon system monitor (menu bar + dashboard) with first-class ANE, Media Engine and memory-bandwidth tracking plus an E/P-core breakdown — the chip-level signals Activity Monitor doesn't show.
Website: https://siliconscope.calidalab.ai
Commit: Add SiliconScope (Apple Silicon system monitor) (#2211)
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/fb07331b5de1a1e46041a802de0c779f62f24152

item.title: JsonStudio
item.description: Category: Developer Tools / Developer Utilities App: JsonStudio Description: Local-first JSON workspace for formatting, editing, diffing, converting, validating, and extracting JSON from logs. Website: https://jsonstudio.js.org/ Commit: Add JsonStudio (#2209) Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/21fe432c4601693abd676f4279e1f834f0c5d759
item.content:encoded:
Category: Developer Tools / Developer Utilities
App: JsonStudio
Description: Local-first JSON workspace for formatting, editing, diffing, converting, validating, and extracting JSON from logs.
Website: https://jsonstudio.js.org/
Commit: Add JsonStudio (#2209)
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/21fe432c4601693abd676f4279e1f834f0c5d759

item.title: Tintpad
item.description: Category: Developer Tools / Developer Utilities App: Tintpad Description: Menu bar launcher that opens your terminal at the right repo with a coding agent (Claude Code, Codex) already running. Open Source: https://github.com/sorkila/tintpad Commit: Add Tintpad (Developer Utilities) (#2206) Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/6caec1eb50a74f4503af2901213c7cde6ae344c2

item.title: Agent Island
item.description: Category: Utilities / Menu Bar Tools App: Agent Island Description: MacBook notch companion for Claude Code and Codex sessions, showing live status and auto-resuming selected long-running tasks. item.title: Cate
item.description: Category: Developer Tools / IDEs App: Cate Description: Open-source IDE on an infinite zoomable canvas, with editor, terminal, browser, and AI agent panels arranged in a spatial workspace. item.title: Mole Widget
item.description: Category: Utilities / Menu Bar Tools App: Mole Widget Description: Lightweight macOS desktop system monitor: live CPU, memory, disk, network, battery, and process metrics in a resizable widget managed from the menu bar. Open Source: https://github.com/bsnkhua/mole-widget Commit: Add Mole Widget (Menu Bar Tools) (#2156) Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/a2115f4216124391b70062044ccb24b30599e927
item.content:encoded:
Category: Utilities / Menu Bar Tools
App: Mole Widget
Description: Lightweight macOS desktop system monitor: live CPU, memory, disk, network, battery, and process metrics in a resizable widget managed from the menu bar.
Open Source: https://github.com/bsnkhua/mole-widget
Commit: Add Mole Widget (Menu Bar Tools) (#2156)
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/a2115f4216124391b70062044ccb24b30599e927

item.title: Fader
